instruction: Relocate the white‑rimmed cup on the wooden desk to the left of the laptop, centered vertically along the laptop’s left edge, leaving a narrow, even gap of about 2–3 cm between the cup and the laptop. Keep the cup upright and resting flat on the desk. Recompute lighting for the scene’s single hard sunlight coming from the upper‑left (as indicated by the laptop’s sharp shadow): render a crisp, complete shadow of the cup that falls down‑right at the same angle and hardness as other shadows, with a tight contact shadow under the base; the shadow shape must clearly match the cup’s silhouette. Adjust highlights and shading on the cup’s rim and the liquid to match the new position and light direction. Do not move or alter the laptop or desk; only the cup and its lighting/shadow are changed.

prompts.superficial: Move the cup closer to left side of the laptop.
prompts.intermediate: Move the white‑rimmed cup toward the laptop’s left edge on the wooden desk while keeping it upright and grounded. Ensure no interpenetration with the laptop. Update the cast shadow, contact shadow, and specular highlights so they follow the single directional light in the scene (sunlight from upper‑left), with shadow direction and occlusion consistent with light propagation.
prompts.explicit: Relocate the white‑rimmed cup on the wooden desk to the left of the laptop, centered vertically along the laptop’s left edge, leaving a narrow, even gap of about 2–3 cm between the cup and the laptop. Keep the cup upright and resting flat on the desk. Recompute lighting for the scene’s single hard sunlight coming from the upper‑left (as indicated by the laptop’s sharp shadow): render a crisp, complete shadow of the cup that falls down‑right at the same angle and hardness as other shadows, with a tight contact shadow under the base; the shadow shape must clearly match the cup’s silhouette. Adjust highlights and shading on the cup’s rim and the liquid to match the new position and light direction. Do not move or alter the laptop or desk; only the cup and its lighting/shadow are changed.

annotated_qa_pairs.question: Is the white-rimmed cup to the left of the laptop?
Is the cup's cast shadow oriented down-right at the same angle as the laptop's cast shadow?
Is the cup spatially separate from the laptop?
